title: Pythonic iteration – replace index loop with direct for loop
diff_patch:
--- a/processing/batch.py
+++ b/processing/batch.py
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 def print_items(items):
-    for i in range(len(items)):
-        print(items[i])
+    for item in items:
+        print(item)

title: Replace manual accumulation with list comprehension
diff_patch:
--- a/analytics/transform.py
+++ b/analytics/transform.py
@@ -1,6 +1,4 @@
 def square_all(nums):
-    result = []
-    for n in nums:
-        result.append(n * n)
-    return result
+    return [n * n for n in nums]
expected_patch:
def square_all(nums):
    return [n * n for n in nums]
reference_tokens: return [n * n for n in nums]

title: Use context manager for file I/O
diff_patch:
--- a/io/file_reader.py
+++ b/io/file_reader.py
@@ -1,6 +1,5 @@
 def read_file(path):
-    f = open(path, 'r')
-    content = f.read()
-    f.close()
-    return content
+    with open(path, 'r') as f:
+        return f.read()

title: Replace string concatenation in loop with join()
diff_patch:
--- a/formatters/text.py
+++ b/formatters/text.py
@@ -1,6 +1,4 @@
 def join_words(words):
-    result = ''
-    for w in words:
-        result += w + ' '
-    return result.strip()
+    return ' '.join(words)
expected_patch:
def join_words(words):
    return ' '.join(words)

title: Use enumerate instead of manual counter
diff_patch:
--- a/display/renderer.py
+++ b/display/renderer.py
@@ -1,6 +1,4 @@
 def render_list(items):
-    idx = 0
-    for item in items:
-        print(idx, item)
-        idx += 1
+    for idx, item in enumerate(items):
+        print(idx, item)

title: Replace try/except pass with logging
diff_patch:
--- a/core/safe_runner.py
+++ b/core/safe_runner.py
@@ -1,6 +1,7 @@
 def safe_run(fn, *args):
     try:
         return fn(*args)
-    except Exception:
-        pass
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception("safe_run failed: %s", e)
+        return None

title: Remove redundant isinstance check – duck-typing preferred
diff_patch:
--- a/utils/duck.py
+++ b/utils/duck.py
@@ -1,6 +1,5 @@
 def process(obj):
-    if isinstance(obj, list):
-        for item in obj:
-            handle(item)
+    for item in obj:
+        handle(item)

title: Replace multiple os.path calls with pathlib
diff_patch:
--- a/fs/paths.py
+++ b/fs/paths.py
@@ -1,7 +1,6 @@
-import os
+from pathlib import Path
 
 def build_path(base, sub, filename):
-    path = os.path.join(base, sub)
-    path = os.path.join(path, filename)
-    return path
+    return Path(base) / sub / filename

title: Multi-file PR: replace raw dict with dataclass across two modules
diff_patch:
--- a/models/user.py
+++ b/models/user.py
@@ -1,4 +1,8 @@
-def make_user(name, age):
-    return {'name': name, 'age': age}
+from dataclasses import dataclass
+
+@dataclass
+class User:
+    name: str
+    age: int
--- a/api/serializer.py
+++ b/api/serializer.py
@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@
-def serialize(user_dict):
-    return f"{user_dict['name']} ({user_dict['age']})"
+from models.user import User
+
+def serialize(user: User) -> str:
+    return f"{user.name} ({user.age})"

title: Use context manager when loading dataset file
diff_patch:
--- a/data/loader.py
+++ b/data/loader.py
@@ -1,6 +1,5 @@
 def load_rows(path):
-    f = open(path, 'r')
-    rows = f.read().splitlines()
-    f.close()
-    return rows
+    with open(path, 'r') as f:
+        return f.read().splitlines()

title: Replace index loop with direct iteration in metrics

title: Replace manual filter with list comprehension
